chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-6102 of 2024 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 21.01.2026 Mr. Mansab Ali, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ------------------------- The petitioner filed a constitutional petition under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking a declaration that the respondents’ acts restraining him from travelling abroad are illegal and unconstitutional, and requesting the removal of his name from the blacklist to allow travel to Saudi Arabia. Respondents stated that the petitioner’s name is on the Passport Control List (PCL) due to deportation from the UAE, and under Passport Rules, 2021, he may apply to the Director General, Immigration and Passports, for removal. The DG’s representative confirmed on 28.11.2025 that any such application would be processed and decided through a speaking order after hearing the petitioner. It appears that the petitioner has already submitted the application, which the competent authority shall decide within two weeks. Petition stands disposed of accordingly. Let a copy of this order be communicated to all concerned for compliance in time. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
